title: Shatapatha Brahmana I: The Creation of Fire
description: Shatapatha Brahmana I — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.
introduction: Shatapatha Brahmana I — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.

translation.text: In the beginning, Prajapati alone was here. He desired: 'May I be many, may I procreate.' He performed austerities. From his mouth he created Agni, the fire. Therefore Agni is at the head of the sacrifice.
